# PillAn { #astroapers.PillAn }

```python
PillAn(
    positions,
    w_in,
    a_in,
    b_in,
    w_out,
    a_out,
    b_out,
    *,
    theta_in=0.0,
    theta_out=None,
    plot_samples=96,
    validate=True,
)
```

Capsule-like annulus with explicit inner and outer pills.

The outer boundary is a pill with rectangle length ``w_out`` and cap
semiaxes ``a_out`` and ``b_out``. The inner boundary uses explicit
``w_in``, ``a_in``, and ``b_in`` values. Its masks use fused Rust kernels
that subtract the inner composite pill from the outer composite pill.
If ``theta_out`` is `None`, it defaults to ``theta_in``.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**positions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple or array - like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Annulus center or centers as ``(x, y)`` pixel coordinates. Multiple centers are accepted as an ``(N, 2)`` array-like object.

<code>[**w_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inner central-rectangle length in pixels.

<code>[**a_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inner cap semimajor axis in pixels.

<code>[**b_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Inner cap semiminor axis in pixels.

<code>[**w_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Outer central-rectangle length in pixels. Must be larger than ``w_in``.

<code>[**a_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Outer cap semimajor axis in pixels. Must be larger than ``a_in``.

<code>[**b_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Outer cap semiminor axis in pixels. Must be larger than ``b_in``.

<code>[**theta_in**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Inner pill rotation angle in radians, measured counterclockwise from the positive x axis.

<code>[**theta_out**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Outer pill rotation angle in radians, measured counterclockwise from the positive x axis. If `None`, it defaults to ``theta_in``.

<code>[**plot_samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [96]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Even number of samples used to draw each pill boundary when creating Matplotlib patches.

<code>[**validate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If `False`, skip input validation and assume finite, positive geometry, ordered inner/outer dimensions, and normalized positions.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**area**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Analytic geometric annulus area. Image clipping and bad-pixel masks are accounted for by ``npix`` results, not by this property.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [apsum](#astroapers.PillAn.apsum) | Return pill-annulus sums, and npix by default. |

### apsum { #astroapers.PillAn.apsum }

```python
PillAn.apsum(data, mask=None, *, method='exact', return_npix=True)
```

Return pill-annulus sums, and npix by default.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**data**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Two-dimensional image.

<code>[**mask**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [array_like of bool]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Boolean image mask with the same shape as ``data``. ``True`` pixels are excluded from both ``apsum`` and ``npix``.

<code>[**return_npix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If `True`, return ``(apsum, npix)``. If `False`, return only ``apsum``.
